hero.title: Connecting Youth to Opportunities and the Future
hero.subtitle: YouthConnekt Chad is a national youth empowerment program that facilitates access to opportunities, skills development, and entrepreneurship to build the Chad of tomorrow.

about_section.title: Who We Are
about_section.subtitle: YouthConnekt Chad is a national platform dedicated to empowering Chadian youth. We create bridges between young people and the opportunities that shape their future.

programs_section.title: Our Programs
programs_section.subtitle: Programs designed to meet the real needs of Chadian youth, from training to entrepreneurship.

employability.title: Employability & Skills
employability.desc: Practical training, certifications and employment support for graduates and job seekers.

entrepreneurship.title: Entrepreneurship & Incubation
entrepreneurship.desc: Support for startups and young entrepreneurs through coaching, mentoring and access to financing.

innovation.title: Innovation & Digital
innovation.desc: Hackathons, innovation challenges and digital training to prepare youth for the digital economy.

leadership.title: Civic Engagement & Leadership
leadership.desc: Citizenship leadership, volunteering and engagement programs to shape tomorrow's decision-makers.

opportunities_section.title: Latest Opportunities
opportunities_section.subtitle: Scholarships, training, competitions, jobs and funding for Chadian youth.

events_section.title: Upcoming Events
events_section.subtitle: Meetings, forums, hackathons and workshops to connect, inspire and train.

testimonials_section.title: Testimonials
testimonials_section.subtitle: Young people who transformed their lives thanks to YouthConnekt Chad.

partners_section.title: Our Partners
partners_section.subtitle: Together, we build an ecosystem that supports the flourishing of Chadian youth.

newsletter_section.title: Stay Informed
newsletter_section.subtitle: Receive the latest opportunities, news and events directly in your inbox.

about.title: About YouthConnekt Chad
about.mission_text: Empower Chadian youth by providing access to opportunities, skills and networks needed to reach their full potential and contribute to Chad's development.
about.vision_text: A Chad where every young person, regardless of background, has the tools and support to build a prosperous future and actively participate in national development.
about.obj1: Reduce youth unemployment by facilitating access to employment and entrepreneurship
about.obj2: Strengthen the technical and soft skills of young people
about.obj3: Create a national network of young leaders and innovators
about.obj4: Promote inclusion, parity and equity in access to opportunities
about.val1_desc: All youth, without discrimination, deserve equal access to opportunities.
about.val2_desc: We aim for the highest standards in everything we undertake.
about.val3_desc: Every action is oriented towards concrete and measurable change.
about.val4_desc: We build together — with youth, institutions and the private sector.
about.faq1_a: All Chadian youth aged 15 to 35 can join the platform, whether they are students, job seekers or young entrepreneurs.
about.faq2_q: How do I apply for an opportunity?
about.faq2_a: Simply create an account, browse available opportunities and submit your application online.
about.faq3_a: The majority of our programs are completely free thanks to the support of our institutional and private partners.
about.faq4_a: Visit our Partners page and fill out the application form. Our team will contact you within 48 hours.
